channel.title: Daily Podcast Briefing
channel.description: Your personal daily podcast briefing. Key takeaways, insights, and actionable items from the best podcast episodes, ranked by relevance.
channel.itunes:author: Lorenzo

item.title: Daily Briefing — 2026-04-04
item.description: Covering 1 episodes: Refactoring Podcast: Every Engineer Is a Manager Now 🤖 — with Chris Lattner (8/10)
item.itunes:summary: Covering 1 episodes: Refactoring Podcast: Every Engineer Is a Manager Now 🤖 — with Chris Lattner (8/10)

item.title: Daily Briefing — 2026-04-03
item.description: Covering 2 episodes: HBR Ideacast: Strategy Summit 2026: Who’s Going to Succeed with AI? (8/10) The Diary Of A CEO: Most Replayed Moment: Mouthwash REVERSES The Benefits Of Exercise! Dr Nathan Bryan (6/10)

item.title: Daily Briefing — 2026-04-02
item.description: Covering 1 episodes: The knowledge project: Joe Liemandt: Alpha School and the Future of Education (8/10)

item.title: Daily Briefing — 2026-04-01
item.description: Covering 4 episodes: HBR Ideacast: Building a Sustainability Strategy Around Customers (6/10) The Diary Of A CEO: Anti-Aging Expert: Stop Touching Receipts Immediately! The Fast Way To Shrink Visceral Fat (8/10) Manager Tools: Building Peer Relationships - Part 1 (9/10) Hidden Brain: When It's Okay to Lie (8/10)
item.itunes:summary: Covering 4 episodes: HBR Ideacast: Building a Sustainability Strategy Around Customers (6/10) The Diary Of A CEO: Anti-Aging Expert: Stop Touching Receipts Immediately! The Fast Way To Shrink Visceral Fat (8/10) Manager Tools: Building Peer Relationships - Part 1 (9/10) Hidden Brain: When It's Okay to Lie (8/10)

item.title: Daily Briefing — 2026-03-25
item.description: Covering 6 episodes: HBR Ideacast: Learn to Disagree More Effectively (8/10) The Diary Of A CEO: David Sinclair: Can Aging Be Reversed? After 8 Weeks, Cells Appeared 75% Younger In Tests! (9/10) Refactoring Podcast: What Comes After the IDE 🖥 — with Amelia Wattenberger (9/10) The knowledge project: [Outliers] Harrison McCain: How to Create Demand for Something Nobody Wants (8/10) Manager Tools: Top Ten Hiring Mistakes - #7 - Being Swayed (9/10) The Peter Attia Drive: #385 - AMA #82: Applying the tools of longevity in the real world: disease prevention, DEXA scans, artificial sweeteners, injury recovery, stability training, habit formation, protein intake and mTOR activation, and more (9/10)
item.itunes:summary: Covering 6 episodes: HBR Ideacast: Learn to Disagree More Effectively (8/10) The Diary Of A CEO: David Sinclair: Can Aging Be Reversed? After 8 Weeks, Cells Appeared 75% Younger In Tests! (9/10) Refactoring Podcast: What Comes After the IDE 🖥 — with Amelia Wattenberger (9/10) The knowledge project: [Outliers] Harrison McCain: How to Create Demand for Something Nobody Wants (8/10) Manager Tools: Top Ten Hiring Mistakes - #7 - Being Swayed (9/10) The Peter Attia Drive: #385 - AMA #82: Applying the tools of longevity in the real world: disease prevention, DEXA scans, artificial sweeteners, injury recovery, stability training, habit formation, protein intake and mTOR activation, and more (9/10)
